memberdef.type: std::conditional_t< prioritize_tasks, std::priority_queue< std::pair< double, TaskT > >, std::deque< TaskT > >

memberdef.name: QueueT

memberdef.definition: using dynampi::NaiveMPIWorkDistributor< TaskT, ResultT, Options >::StatisticsT = std::conditional_t<statistics_mode == StatisticsMode::Detailed, Statistics, std::monostate>
